summary: Decent soundboard‑derived source, solid early mix but loses clarity after the drums
review: The reviewer prefers this recording over three other audio sources, praising its overall balance until the drum segment where the quality drops, prompting a switch to an FOB Sennheiser feed. No specific musical highlights are mentioned, so the performance assessment remains neutral.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; reviewer rates it 3 stars and notes both positives (best of four sources) and negatives (degrades after drums), leading to a neutral overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and balanced early in the set; noticeable loss of clarity/definition after the drum segment, prompting listener to switch sources.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on musical flow or specific songs; reviewer’s focus is purely on audio quality.
